description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run volk_gnsssdr tests that runs on push to specific paths in src/algorithms/libs/volk_gnsssdr_module and CMakeLists.txt, on pull requests to those paths, and on workflow dispatch. Run a matrix of build jobs on ubuntu-latest for various architectures (aarch64, armv7, ppc64le, s390x, riscv64) and compilers (g++-12, clang-14), checking out the repository, setting up the build environment, and running tests with ctest.
